example: You can borrow my car provided you return it tonight.
exampleCn: 只要你今晚把车还回来，你就可以借我的车。

example: The operator answered my call within a few seconds.
exampleCn: 接线员几秒钟之内就接听了我的电话。

example: The virus spread quickly through the crowded school.
exampleCn: 病毒在拥挤的学校里迅速传播开来。

example: Building the bridge here was a strategic decision.
exampleCn: 在这里建桥是一个战略性的决定。

example: We rented extra storage space for our old furniture.
exampleCn: 我们租了额外的储藏空间来存放旧家具。

example: She wore a faded jean jacket over her white shirt.
exampleCn: 她在白衬衫外面套了一件褪色的牛仔夹克。

example: My assistant will schedule the meeting for tomorrow morning.
exampleCn: 我的助理会把会议安排在明天上午。

example: Regular exercise can strengthen your heart and muscles.
exampleCn: 经常锻炼可以增强你的心脏和肌肉。

example: Please write a brief summary of this report.
exampleCn: 请为这份报告写一个简短的摘要。

example: I found the lamp in the autumn catalogue.
exampleCn: 我在秋季商品目录里找到了这盏灯。

example: Please wipe the table before we set the dishes.
exampleCn: 在摆放餐具之前，请先把桌子擦一擦。

example: Travelers often encounter unexpected problems in foreign countries.
exampleCn: 旅行者在国外经常会遇到意想不到的问题。

example: She studies architecture at a famous university in Rome.
exampleCn: 她在罗马一所著名大学学习建筑学。

example: We went shopping for groceries on Saturday morning.
exampleCn: 我们星期六上午去采购了食品杂货。

example: My cousin is coming to stay with us this summer.
exampleCn: 我的表弟今年夏天要来和我们住在一起。

example: She received an award for her outstanding performance.
exampleCn: 她因表现杰出而获得了奖励。

example: The minimum age for this job is eighteen.
exampleCn: 这份工作的最低年龄要求是十八岁。

example: The blind man crossed the street with his guide dog.
exampleCn: 那位盲人在导盲犬的带领下过了马路。

example: Drivers should never exceed the speed limit in town.
exampleCn: 司机在城里绝不应超过限速。

example: English remains the dominant language in international business.
exampleCn: 英语仍然是国际商务中占主导地位的语言。

example: The bonus is an incentive for employees to work harder.
exampleCn: 奖金是激励员工更加努力工作的一种动力。

example: He worked like a slave to support his family.
exampleCn: 他像奴隶一样拼命工作来养家糊口。

example: The weather forecast was surprisingly accurate this week.
exampleCn: 这周的天气预报准确得出人意料。

example: Can you translate this letter into English for me?
exampleCn: 你能帮我把这封信翻译成英文吗？

example: His argument is purely theoretical and lacks real evidence.
exampleCn: 他的论点纯属理论，缺乏实际证据。

example: The loud explosion filled the villagers with terror.
exampleCn: 巨大的爆炸声让村民们充满了恐惧。

example: Only the elite of the sport compete at this level.
exampleCn: 只有这项运动的精英才能在这个级别比赛。

example: The instructions were too complicated for me to follow.
exampleCn: 这些说明太复杂了，我看不懂。

example: She worked alongside her father in the small bakery.
exampleCn: 她和父亲一起在那家小面包店里干活。

example: These shoes are too tight for my feet.
exampleCn: 这双鞋我穿太紧了。

example: We need a replacement for the broken printer soon.
exampleCn: 我们需要尽快找一台新打印机来替换坏掉的那台。

example: This chart shows our sales growth over five years.
exampleCn: 这张图表展示了我们五年来的销售增长情况。

example: The police found no proof that he was there.
exampleCn: 警方没有找到他曾在场的任何证据。

example: Many homes now use solar energy for heating water.
exampleCn: 现在许多家庭使用太阳能来烧热水。

example: You must practise the piano every day to improve.
exampleCn: 你必须每天练习钢琴才能进步。

example: The heavy workload put great strain on her health.
exampleCn: 繁重的工作给她的健康带来了巨大的压力。

example: He spends his leisure time reading and fishing.
exampleCn: 他把闲暇时间用来读书和钓鱼。

example: She wrote a cheque to pay for the furniture.
exampleCn: 她开了一张支票来支付家具的费用。

example: He tore a strip of paper from the notebook.
exampleCn: 他从笔记本上撕下了一条纸。

example: The wealthy merchant sold silk along the ancient road.
exampleCn: 那位富有的商人沿着古道贩卖丝绸。

example: Hot steam rose from the soup on the table.
exampleCn: 桌上的汤冒着腾腾的热气。

example: The country must import most of its oil.
exampleCn: 这个国家的大部分石油必须依靠进口。

example: She saw her reflection in the shop window.
exampleCn: 她在商店橱窗里看到了自己的映像。

example: Through the telescope we could see the rings of Saturn.
exampleCn: 通过望远镜，我们能看到土星的光环。

example: The surgeon made a precise cut with steady hands.
exampleCn: 外科医生用稳健的双手做了精确的切口。

example: The farmers grow wheat on the wide plain.
exampleCn: 农民们在广阔的平原上种植小麦。

example: She enjoys reading science fiction before going to bed.
exampleCn: 她喜欢在睡前读科幻小说。

example: He saw incredible changes during his long lifetime.
exampleCn: 在漫长的一生中，他目睹了难以置信的变化。

example: The museum offers free admission every Sunday.
exampleCn: 这家博物馆每逢周日免费入场。

example: The new bridge was a tremendous engineering achievement.
exampleCn: 这座新桥是一项了不起的工程成就。

example: The senator promised to support the new education bill.
exampleCn: 这位参议员承诺支持新的教育法案。

example: The train passed through a long tunnel under the mountain.
exampleCn: 火车穿过了山下一条长长的隧道。

example: She reads poetry aloud to her children every night.
exampleCn: 她每天晚上给孩子们大声朗读诗歌。

example: I ordered a fresh salad with grilled chicken.
exampleCn: 我点了一份配烤鸡肉的新鲜色拉。

example: This soft fabric is perfect for a summer dress.
exampleCn: 这种柔软的面料非常适合做夏装。

example: Farmers need rain to sustain their crops through summer.
exampleCn: 农民需要雨水来维持庄稼度过夏天。

example: A simple answer will not satisfy curious students.
exampleCn: 一个简单的回答无法满足好奇的学生们。

example: The court finally declared the young man innocent.
exampleCn: 法庭最终宣判这名年轻人无罪。

example: She spoke in a gentle voice to calm the baby.
exampleCn: 她用温柔的声音安抚婴儿。

example: The fishing vessel returned to port before the storm.
exampleCn: 渔船在暴风雨来临前返回了港口。

example: Could you do me a favour and watch my bag?
exampleCn: 你能帮我个忙，看一下我的包吗？

example: An old man sat on the park bench feeding pigeons.
exampleCn: 一位老人坐在公园长椅上喂鸽子。

example: Eating raw fish is common in Japanese cuisine.
exampleCn: 在日本料理中，吃生鱼是很常见的。

example: She is studying economics at Harvard this year.
exampleCn: 她今年在哈佛大学学习经济学。

example: First, it saves time; secondly, it costs much less.
exampleCn: 第一，它节省时间；其次，它的成本要低得多。

example: Passengers gathered on the deck to watch the sunset.
exampleCn: 乘客们聚集在甲板上观看日落。

example: Her determination helped her finish the marathon despite the pain.
exampleCn: 尽管疼痛难忍，她的决心帮助她跑完了马拉松。

example: Every magnet has a north pole and a south pole.
exampleCn: 每块磁铁都有一个北极和一个南极。

example: It was silly of me to forget my keys again.
exampleCn: 我又忘带钥匙，真是太傻了。

example: Two witnesses will testify against him in court tomorrow.
exampleCn: 明天将有两名证人出庭作证指控他。

example: The newly married couple moved into a small apartment.
exampleCn: 这对新婚夫妇搬进了一间小公寓。

example: This quiet residential area has many parks and schools.
exampleCn: 这个安静的住宅区有许多公园和学校。

example: The crisis brought a new sense of unity to the nation.
exampleCn: 这场危机给这个国家带来了新的团结感。

example: The company's annual turnover reached two million dollars.
exampleCn: 这家公司的年营业额达到了两百万美元。

example: Their friendship is based on mutual respect and trust.
exampleCn: 他们的友谊建立在相互尊重和信任的基础上。

example: The house is beautiful; furthermore, the price is reasonable.
exampleCn: 这房子很漂亮，而且价格也很合理。

example: She looked at her graduating son with great pride.
exampleCn: 她满怀自豪地看着即将毕业的儿子。

example: About sixty percent of students passed the difficult exam.
exampleCn: 大约百分之六十的学生通过了这次很难的考试。

example: He deliberately left the door open for the cat.
exampleCn: 他故意把门开着，好让猫进出。

example: Water will freeze quickly in this cold weather.
exampleCn: 在这么冷的天气里，水很快就会结冰。

example: Wearing a helmet is a sensible choice for cyclists.
exampleCn: 对骑车的人来说，戴头盔是明智的选择。

example: The city is home to people from diverse cultures.
exampleCn: 这座城市居住着来自不同文化背景的人们。

example: Animals must adapt to survive in changing environments.
exampleCn: 动物必须适应不断变化的环境才能生存。

example: The company moved its headquarters from London to Berlin.
exampleCn: 这家公司把总部从伦敦迁到了柏林。

example: She received a reward for returning the lost wallet.
exampleCn: 她因归还丢失的钱包而得到了一笔酬金。

example: Wildlife conservation protects endangered animals and their habitats.
exampleCn: 野生动物保护工作保护着濒危动物及其栖息地。

example: Languages evolve slowly over many generations.
exampleCn: 语言在世代相传中缓慢演变。

example: The young singer performed her new song on stage.
exampleCn: 这位年轻的歌手在舞台上演唱了她的新歌。

example: Students hurried down the corridor to their next class.
exampleCn: 学生们沿着走廊匆匆赶去上下一节课。

example: The city introduced a ban on smoking in restaurants.
exampleCn: 该市出台了餐馆内禁止吸烟的禁令。

example: You should consult a doctor before taking new medicine.
exampleCn: 服用新药之前，你应该先咨询医生。

example: Her kind words brought great comfort to the family.
exampleCn: 她善意的话语给这家人带来了极大的安慰。

example: Children use their imagination when they play games.
exampleCn: 孩子们玩游戏时会运用他们的想象力。

example: She placed the coffee cups on the kitchen counter.
exampleCn: 她把咖啡杯放在厨房的柜台上。

example: The doctor asked me to stick out my tongue.
exampleCn: 医生让我把舌头伸出来。

example: The car crash blocked traffic for two hours.
exampleCn: 那起撞车事故导致交通堵塞了两个小时。

example: Some conflict is inevitable when people work closely together.
exampleCn: 人们紧密合作时，一些冲突是不可避免的。

example: The teacher gave us an outline of the course.
exampleCn: 老师给了我们一份课程大纲。

example: She learned the craft of pottery from her grandmother.
exampleCn: 她从祖母那里学会了制陶的手艺。

example: Engineers will reinforce the bridge with steel beams.
exampleCn: 工程师们将用钢梁来加固这座桥。

example: The book offers deep insight into human behavior.
exampleCn: 这本书对人类行为有深刻的洞察。

example: He spoke with conviction about the need for change.
exampleCn: 他满怀坚定的信念谈到变革的必要性。

example: Police arrested the terrorist before the attack happened.
exampleCn: 警方在袭击发生之前逮捕了那名恐怖分子。

example: I heard a gentle tap on the window at night.
exampleCn: 夜里我听到窗户上传来轻轻的敲击声。

example: The magistrate fined the driver for dangerous driving.
exampleCn: 治安法官因危险驾驶对那名司机处以罚款。

example: A small mouse ran across the kitchen floor.
exampleCn: 一只小老鼠跑过了厨房的地板。

example: We watched the final episode of the series last night.
exampleCn: 昨晚我们看了这部剧的最后一集。

example: Fresh vegetables are readily available at the local market.
exampleCn: 在当地市场上很容易买到新鲜蔬菜。

example: Long meetings always tire me out completely.
exampleCn: 冗长的会议总是让我疲惫不堪。

example: This shirt is too loose around the shoulders.
exampleCn: 这件衬衫的肩部太宽松了。

example: Please highlight the key points in the report.
exampleCn: 请把报告中的要点突出标注出来。

example: She had no prior experience in teaching children.
exampleCn: 她之前没有任何教孩子的经验。

example: The professor enjoyed intellectual debates with his students.
exampleCn: 这位教授喜欢和学生们进行智识上的辩论。

example: Bright colors characterize the paintings of this artist.
exampleCn: 鲜艳的色彩是这位画家作品的鲜明特色。

example: The soldiers launched an assault on the enemy camp.
exampleCn: 士兵们对敌人的营地发起了攻击。

example: She sat on the bottom stair waiting for her mother.
exampleCn: 她坐在最下面一级楼梯上等妈妈。

example: The central bank changed its monetary policy last month.
exampleCn: 中央银行上个月调整了货币政策。

example: He answered my question with a careless shrug.
exampleCn: 他满不在乎地耸耸肩，算是回答了我的问题。

example: Chocolate is my greatest weakness when I diet.
exampleCn: 节食的时候，巧克力是我最大的弱点。

example: The police found no trace of the missing jewels.
exampleCn: 警方没有发现失踪珠宝的任何踪迹。

example: Parking here is a violation of city rules.
exampleCn: 在这里停车违反了城市规定。

example: We must get rid of these old newspapers.
exampleCn: 我们必须把这些旧报纸处理掉。

example: You need a license to drive a truck here.
exampleCn: 在这里开卡车需要持有执照。

example: The hikers found shelter from the rain in a cave.
exampleCn: 徒步者们在一个山洞里找到了避雨的地方。

example: Gently rub the cream into your dry skin.
exampleCn: 把乳霜轻轻揉搓进干燥的皮肤里。

example: The white sail caught the wind as we left harbor.
exampleCn: 我们驶出港口时，白色的船帆鼓满了风。

example: The new law caused great controversy among voters.
exampleCn: 这项新法律在选民中引起了很大的争议。

example: Plants absorb water and nutrients through their roots.
exampleCn: 植物通过根部吸收水分和养分。

example: We had a pleasant evening walking along the beach.
exampleCn: 我们沿着海滩散步，度过了一个愉快的夜晚。

example: Workers dug a deep pit for the new foundation.
exampleCn: 工人们为新地基挖了一个深坑。

example: Bright curtains fade quickly in direct sunlight.
exampleCn: 鲜艳的窗帘在阳光直射下很快就会褪色。

example: She made a friendly gesture to welcome the guests.
exampleCn: 她做了一个友好的手势来欢迎客人。

example: The fire was a terrible tragedy for the small town.
exampleCn: 这场大火对这个小镇来说是一场可怕的悲剧。

example: Hundreds of people attended the soldier's funeral yesterday.
exampleCn: 昨天数百人参加了那位士兵的葬礼。

example: Children love to pretend they are brave pirates.
exampleCn: 孩子们喜欢假装自己是勇敢的海盗。

example: This ticket will entitle you to a free drink.
exampleCn: 凭这张票你有权获得一杯免费饮料。

example: I am deeply grateful for all your help.
exampleCn: 我对你所有的帮助深表感激。

example: Their new business venture failed within a year.
exampleCn: 他们新的商业冒险不到一年就失败了。

example: He gave my hand a gentle squeeze before leaving.
exampleCn: 离开之前，他轻轻地握了握我的手。

example: A famous architect designed this stunning glass building.
exampleCn: 一位著名建筑师设计了这座令人惊叹的玻璃大楼。

example: The nurse wore a mask to prevent infection.
exampleCn: 护士戴着口罩以防止感染。

example: The medieval cathedral towers over the old city.
exampleCn: 那座中世纪大教堂高耸于老城之上。

example: She is a prominent figure in modern science.
exampleCn: 她是现代科学界的杰出人物。

example: Please confine your comments to the topic being discussed.
exampleCn: 请把你的发言限制在正在讨论的话题范围内。

example: She received an acceptance letter from the university.
exampleCn: 她收到了那所大学的录取通知书。

example: He continued working regardless of the heavy rain.
exampleCn: 他不顾大雨，继续工作。

example: Every research method has its own limitation.
exampleCn: 每种研究方法都有其自身的局限性。

example: Please arrive two hours before your flight's departure.
exampleCn: 请在航班起飞前两小时到达。

example: The detective carefully examined the clues at the scene.
exampleCn: 侦探仔细检查了现场的线索。

example: World leaders met at the climate summit in Paris.
exampleCn: 世界各国领导人在巴黎的气候峰会上会晤。

example: Companies that violate safety rules will face heavy fines.
exampleCn: 违反安全规定的公司将面临巨额罚款。

example: He resigned early, thereby avoiding a public scandal.
exampleCn: 他提前辞职，从而避免了一场公开的丑闻。

example: A deer crossed the quiet road at dawn.
exampleCn: 黎明时分，一只鹿穿过了安静的公路。

example: The teacher praised her composition about summer holidays.
exampleCn: 老师表扬了她那篇关于暑假的作文。

example: They sailed across the Pacific Ocean for three weeks.
exampleCn: 他们花了三个星期横渡太平洋。

example: Hold the ladder steady while I climb up.
exampleCn: 我往上爬的时候，把梯子扶稳。

example: The new engine reduces carbon emission by thirty percent.
exampleCn: 这款新发动机将碳排放减少了百分之三十。

example: Engineers found serious structural problems in the old bridge.
exampleCn: 工程师们在这座旧桥上发现了严重的结构问题。

example: She believed fate brought them together that day.
exampleCn: 她相信是命运让他们在那天相遇。

example: The professor gave a long discourse on ancient philosophy.
exampleCn: 教授就古代哲学发表了一场长篇演讲。

example: Bake the bread in a hot oven for thirty minutes.
exampleCn: 把面包放进热烤箱里烤三十分钟。

example: This segment of the road is under construction.
exampleCn: 这一段道路正在施工。

example: There was nowhere to park near the stadium.
exampleCn: 体育场附近无处停车。

example: She enjoys an occasional cup of coffee after dinner.
exampleCn: 她喜欢偶尔在晚饭后喝杯咖啡。

example: The hotel reception is open twenty-four hours a day.
exampleCn: 酒店的接待处一天二十四小时开放。

example: His decision was purely based on personal interest.
exampleCn: 他的决定纯粹是出于个人利益。

example: Put the books back on the top shelf.
exampleCn: 把书放回最上面的架子上。

example: The lawyer raised an objection during the trial.
exampleCn: 律师在庭审过程中提出了异议。

example: She writes in her diary every night before bed.
exampleCn: 她每天晚上睡前都写日记。

example: The war correspondent reported live from the front line.
exampleCn: 这位战地记者从前线进行了现场报道。

example: The refugees were desperate for food and clean water.
exampleCn: 难民们极度渴望得到食物和干净的水。

example: The street musician played the violin beautifully.
exampleCn: 那位街头音乐家小提琴拉得非常动听。

example: The machine requires a continuous supply of electricity.
exampleCn: 这台机器需要连续不断的电力供应。

example: She watched in horror as the building collapsed.
exampleCn: 她惊恐地看着大楼倒塌。

example: The mechanic will repair my car by Friday.
exampleCn: 修理工会在周五之前把我的车修好。

example: Thousands had to flee the city during the war.
exampleCn: 战争期间，成千上万的人不得不逃离这座城市。

example: He bought a brown leather jacket for winter.
exampleCn: 他买了一件棕色皮夹克过冬。

example: The cow grazed peacefully in the green meadow.
exampleCn: 那头母牛在绿色的草地上安静地吃草。

example: Darwin's theory of evolution changed science forever.
exampleCn: 达尔文的进化论永远地改变了科学。

example: The ancient tribe lived deep in the rainforest.
exampleCn: 这个古老的部落生活在雨林深处。

example: The mother rocked her sleeping infant in her arms.
exampleCn: 母亲把熟睡的婴儿抱在怀里轻轻摇晃。

example: The nurse checked every patient in the ward.
exampleCn: 护士查看了病房里的每一位病人。

example: My grandfather tells wonderful stories about his childhood.
exampleCn: 我的祖父常讲他童年时的精彩故事。

example: Dad mows the lawn every Sunday morning.
exampleCn: 爸爸每个星期天早上都修剪草坪。

example: We can learn great wisdom from ancient books.
exampleCn: 我们可以从古书中学到伟大的智慧。

example: Young children are especially vulnerable to this disease.
exampleCn: 幼儿尤其容易感染这种疾病。

example: She opened a tin of beans for dinner.
exampleCn: 她打开一罐豆子当晚餐。

example: Add some chopped garlic to the hot oil.
exampleCn: 往热油里加入一些切碎的大蒜。

example: This phone has the capability to translate speech instantly.
exampleCn: 这款手机具有即时翻译语音的能力。

example: Patience is a virtue that few people possess.
exampleCn: 耐心是一种很少有人具备的美德。

example: Write your notes in the margin of the page.
exampleCn: 把你的笔记写在页边的空白处。

example: Economic stability is essential for long-term growth.
exampleCn: 经济稳定对长期增长至关重要。

example: Boats carried goods along the canal for centuries.
exampleCn: 几个世纪以来，船只一直沿着这条运河运送货物。

example: He dropped a coin into the fountain and made a wish.
exampleCn: 他把一枚硬币投进喷泉，许了个愿。

example: She worked hard to fulfil her childhood dream.
exampleCn: 她努力工作以实现儿时的梦想。

example: Make sure the meat is sufficiently cooked before serving.
exampleCn: 上菜之前要确保肉已充分煮熟。

example: They bought a small plot of land near the river.
exampleCn: 他们在河边买了一小块地。

example: These grey trousers match your jacket perfectly.
exampleCn: 这条灰色长裤和你的外套非常相配。

example: The old house was built from local timber.
exampleCn: 这座老房子是用当地的木材建造的。

example: She studied psychology to understand human behavior better.
exampleCn: 她学习心理学是为了更好地理解人类行为。

example: The farmer raises cattle on the wide grassland.
exampleCn: 这位农民在广阔的草原上养牛。

example: Police will seize any illegal goods at the border.
exampleCn: 警方将在边境没收任何非法货物。

example: It was evident that she had been crying.
exampleCn: 很明显，她刚刚哭过。

example: Their divorce was finalized after twenty years of marriage.
exampleCn: 结婚二十年后，他们最终办理了离婚。

example: English grammar can be difficult for beginners.
exampleCn: 对初学者来说，英语语法可能很难。

example: She comes from a very athletic family of runners.
exampleCn: 她出身于一个擅长跑步的运动世家。

example: We need her technical expertise for this project.
exampleCn: 这个项目需要她的专业技术。

example: This herb is commonly used in Italian cooking.
exampleCn: 这种香草在意大利菜中很常用。

example: We saw a famous opera at the grand theater.
exampleCn: 我们在大剧院观看了一部著名的歌剧。

example: We rested in the shade of a large oak tree.
exampleCn: 我们在一棵大橡树的树荫下休息。

example: The patient lost consciousness after hitting his head.
exampleCn: 病人撞到头部后失去了知觉。

example: The main constraint on the project is limited funding.
exampleCn: 这个项目的主要制约因素是资金有限。

example: Many students dream of studying overseas after graduation.
exampleCn: 许多学生梦想毕业后去海外留学。

example: She held the tiny bird gently in her palm.
exampleCn: 她把那只小鸟轻轻地捧在手掌心里。

example: Hot chicken soup is perfect on a cold day.
exampleCn: 在寒冷的日子里，热鸡汤再合适不过了。

example: A pile of dirty dishes sat in the sink.
exampleCn: 水槽里堆着一摞脏盘子。

example: The scandal brought unwanted publicity to the company.
exampleCn: 这桩丑闻给公司带来了不想要的曝光。

example: Trees absorb carbon dioxide from the atmosphere.
exampleCn: 树木从大气中吸收二氧化碳。

example: It took nerve to speak in front of thousands.
exampleCn: 在数千人面前讲话是需要勇气的。

example: Modern cars consume less fuel than older models.
exampleCn: 现代汽车比旧款车型消耗的燃油更少。

example: The government raised taxes on tobacco products again.
exampleCn: 政府再次提高了烟草产品的税收。

example: A sudden burst of laughter came from the classroom.
exampleCn: 教室里突然爆发出一阵笑声。

example: A wealthy businessman donated money to build the library.
exampleCn: 一位富有的商人捐钱修建了这座图书馆。

example: Our galaxy contains billions of stars and planets.
exampleCn: 我们的星系包含数十亿颗恒星和行星。

example: Education should be a right, not a privilege.
exampleCn: 教育应该是一项权利，而不是一种特权。

example: The lab uses sophisticated equipment to analyze samples.
exampleCn: 这个实验室使用尖端设备来分析样本。

example: The explosion shattered windows across the entire street.
exampleCn: 爆炸震碎了整条街的窗户。

example: He missed the train and consequently arrived late.
exampleCn: 他没赶上火车，所以迟到了。

example: Her dog has been a loyal companion for years.
exampleCn: 多年来，她的狗一直是她忠实的伙伴。

example: The view from the mountain top was simply incredible.
exampleCn: 从山顶望去的景色简直令人难以置信。

example: Tourists love to wander through the old town streets.
exampleCn: 游客们喜欢在老城的街道上漫步。

example: The delivery van stopped outside our house this morning.
exampleCn: 今天早上，送货车停在了我们家门口。

example: The fighter trained for months before the championship match.
exampleCn: 这位拳手在冠军赛前训练了好几个月。

example: The punishment should fit the seriousness of the crime.
exampleCn: 惩罚应当与罪行的严重程度相称。

example: We learned to ski in the Alps last winter.
exampleCn: 去年冬天我们在阿尔卑斯山学会了滑雪。

example: Falling rocks could injure climbers on this dangerous path.
exampleCn: 在这条危险的小路上，落石可能会砸伤登山者。

example: We should exploit solar energy to reduce pollution.
exampleCn: 我们应该利用太阳能来减少污染。

example: Recovering from the surgery was a slow, painful process.
exampleCn: 手术后的康复是一个缓慢而痛苦的过程。

example: The government will allocate more funds to rural schools.
exampleCn: 政府将为农村学校分配更多的资金。

example: A white rabbit hopped across the garden path.
exampleCn: 一只白兔蹦蹦跳跳地穿过了花园小径。

example: He wore an old coat with a patch on the elbow.
exampleCn: 他穿着一件肘部打了补丁的旧外套。

example: The medieval castle attracts thousands of visitors each year.
exampleCn: 这座中世纪城堡每年吸引成千上万的游客。

example: Grandma sat on the porch watching the sunset.
exampleCn: 奶奶坐在门廊上看日落。

example: All students must wear a school uniform here.
exampleCn: 这里的所有学生都必须穿校服。

example: She won a full scholarship to study abroad.
exampleCn: 她赢得了出国留学的全额奖学金。

example: I made a reservation for two at the restaurant.
exampleCn: 我在那家餐厅预订了两个人的位子。

example: The completion of the bridge took nearly five years.
exampleCn: 这座桥的建成花了将近五年时间。

example: They signed a two-year lease on the apartment.
exampleCn: 他们签了这套公寓两年的租约。

example: They walked along the tree-lined mall toward the fountain.
exampleCn: 他们沿着绿树成荫的林荫道走向喷泉。

example: Strict laws govern the sale of medicines here.
exampleCn: 这里的药品销售受到严格法律的管制。
